team-maker-codebase-analysis.content:
## Team Maker Codebase Analysis (2026-03-26)

### Project Overview
Web-based manager for running multiple Claude Code CLI instances from a browser. Spawns PTY-backed Claude Code processes and streams terminal I/O over WebSocket to an xterm.js frontend. Supports multi-agent orchestration with task boards, messaging, and shared context.

### Tech Stack
- Runtime: Node.js with ES Modules
- Server: Express 5.1 + ws 8.18 + node-pty 0.10.x
- MCP: @modelcontextprotocol/sdk 1.27.1 with Zod schemas
- Frontend: Vanilla HTML/CSS/JS, xterm.js 5.5.0, marked, DOMPurify
- Theme: Catppuccin Mocha
- Persistence: JSON file at ~/.team-maker/state.json

### Server Modules (11 total)
1. index.js — Express HTTP + WebSocket server, all REST endpoints, event broadcasting, shutdown
2. sessionManager.js — Session + SessionManager, PTY lifecycle, JSONL watcher, question detection, idle management
3. teamManager.js — Team CRUD, agent spawning, MCP config generation, model routing
4. taskBoard.js — Task states (pending→assigned→in_progress→completed|failed), dependencies, complexity
5. messageQueue.js — Inter-agent messaging (queue + PTY injection), persistence
6. contextStore.js — Team-scoped key-value knowledge store (500KB cap, LRU eviction)
7. stateStore.js — JSON persistence with dot-path ops, debounced writes
8. jsonlParser.js — Claude Code JSONL log parser, fs.watch + adaptive polling
9. promptBuilder.js — Orchestrator prompt generation, built-in/extra role definitions
10. projectMemoryStore.js — File-based project memory (<cwd>/.team-maker/project-memory.json)
11. templateStore.js — Team role template CRUD

### Frontend Files
- public/index.html — Main HTML with sidebar, tabs, modals, CDN deps
- public/css/style.css — Catppuccin Mocha themed styles
- public/js/app.js — Application logic (Maps-based state, WebSocket, xterm.js)
- public/usage.html — Standalone usage page

### REST API: ~45+ endpoints across sessions, teams, agents, messages, tasks, context, project memory, events, files, templates
### WebSocket: bidirectional (attach/resize/input + terminal data/events/broadcasts)
### MCP Tools: 17 tools (spawn_agent, list_agents, send_message, check_inbox, mark_read, create_task, claim_task, complete_task, fail_task, get_tasks, store_context, query_context, list_context, store_project_memory, query_project_memory, list_project_memory, deprecate_project_memory)
team-maker-codebase-analysis.summary: Full codebase analysis: 11 server modules, vanilla frontend, 45+ REST endpoints, 17 MCP tools, WebSocket protocol
